_comment_nist_fields: Fields below follow IR 8278Ar1 Section 3.2 OLIR template
reference_document_element_description: Document and maintain data lineage for critical data elements and high-risk data flows, ensuring lineage is current and accessible to authorized consumers.
comments: DCWF task intersects with WIDAI DQ domain. DQ-T-009 is the strongest semantic match. Secondary: RC-K-012 (RC, cosine: 0.327), RM-T-008 (RM, cosine: 0.316).
_comment_widai_extensions: Fields below are WIDAI extensions per ADR-014

primary_method.name: Cross-Encoder STS
primary_method.description: Semantic Textual Similarity via cross-encoder regression trained on STS-Benchmark.
primary_method.significance: STS 3.1/10 (raw 0.306). No substantive shared vocabulary — relationship is purely semantic. DCWF-only terms [collection, modify, necessary, requirements] vs WIDAI-only terms [accessible, authorized, consumers, critical, current, data] define the semantic distance between the descriptions.

bertscore.significance: BERTScore F1=0.863 (P=0.877, R=0.848). P exceeds R by 0.029 — the DCWF element's 5 words are well-captured by the WIDAI KSA's 22 words, but the KSA contains additional specificity not reflected in the DCWF element.

nli_cross_encoder.significance: NLI: neutral-dominant (99.9%). "Modify collection requirements as necessary." and "Document and maintain data lineage for critical data elements and high-risk data" are related but neither implies nor contradicts the other. Standard result for cross-framework mapping where two independent frameworks describe overlapping competencies with independent vocabulary.

biencoder_cosine.description: Bi-encoder sentence embeddings with cosine similarity.
biencoder_cosine.significance: Bi-encoder 0.365 > STS 0.306 (gap +0.058). Independent encoding finds more similarity than cross-attention. Shared surface terms [none] inflate the bi-encoder, but cross-attention detects semantic divergence beneath the vocabulary overlap.

jaccard_token.description: Token-level Jaccard similarity (intersection/union of lowercased word tokens).
jaccard_token.significance: Jaccard 0.0%. Zero substantive shared tokens. The entire relationship is semantic — no lexical trace. DCWF terms: [collection, modify, necessary, requirements]. WIDAI terms: [accessible, authorized, consumers, critical, current, data].
